reforms.description: The government has initiated a project to develop one-stop shops (guichets uniques) to streamline the administrative processes for business start-ups, allowing all formalities to be handled via the Internet.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By simplifying the start-up process, the initiative is expected to reduce barriers for new businesses, thereby fostering entrepreneurship and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The government expects to take a major step towards reducing the administrative burden on business start-ups in 2003 by introducing one-stop shops.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant step towards improving the business environment, which is crucial for fostering innovation and entrepreneurship.
reforms.source_quote: The government, in co-operation with the municipalities, also expects to take a major step towards reducing the administrative burden on business start-ups in 2003 by introducing one-stop shops (the guichets uniques).
